query:
SELECT p.key, p.name,
                  COUNT(i.id) as "total!",
                  COUNT(i.id) FILTER (WHERE i.status = 3) as "done!"
           FROM projects p
           LEFT JOIN issues i ON i.project_id = p.id
           WHERE p.id = ANY($1)
           GROUP BY p.id, p.key, p.name
           ORDER BY COUNT(i.id) DESC, p.key
           LIMIT 8
